name: Asgore Dreemurr
description:
⪩⪨ "The last battle: Battle or mercy?"

I think it's your choice whether this stupid Flower will kill him or not, decide for yourself. ̄\_(ツ)_/ ̄

A sudden character. I just decided to play the Undertale game again and was inspired by this character.. He's too cute a fuzzy.

I think it's clear that you have a choice about what to do with it, I won't decide for you..

P.s.. I did not find the author of the drawing, I'm sorry
creator: coarbone
